company: Eversource Energy's Connecticut Companies (Connecticut Light and Power Company, Yankee Gas Services Company, Aquarion Water Company)
company_raw: Eversource Energy's Connecticut Companies (Connecticut Light and Power Company, Yankee Gas Services Company, Aquarion Water Company)
source_note: Management Audit of Eversource Energy's Connecticut Companies (Connecticut Light and Power Company, Yankee Gas Services Company, Aquarion Water Company), RFP #2022-01, Public Version, 443 pp, issued February 11, 2025. A statutorily-required PURA-ordered independent management audit (Conn. Gen. Stat. Sections 16-8(b) and 16-8c(b)) examining operations, internal controls, and affiliate transactions across Eversource's CT electric, gas, and water utilities — the corpus's first Connecticut management-audit-class document (prior CT records are rate-design/storm-response decisions) and its first Connecticut water utility (Aquarion). Listed for reference (metadata-only) pending a parser-format assessment for the existing M&O findings chain. Source: Connecticut PURA (portal.ct.gov/PURA/Docket/Management-Audit-Reports).
